title: Convergence timeout due to cyclic dependencies
description: System with cyclic dependencies that prevent convergence within timeout

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect convergence timeout from cycles

title: Oscillating state with periodic resets
description: State that oscillates due to periodic external resets

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect periodic oscillation preventing convergence

title: Convergence failure with floating point precision
description: Numerical convergence that fails due to floating point precision issues

mutation.description: Use direct equality on floating point values

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect floating point precision convergence issues

title: Multi-agent convergence deadlock
description: Multiple agents waiting for each other causing deadlock

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect deadlock in multi-agent convergence

title: Convergence with external dependency failures
description: System that can't converge due to intermittent external service failures

mutation.description: Add dependency on unreliable external service

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect external dependency causing convergence failure

title: Heuristic convergence with local optima
description: Optimization algorithm stuck in local optima preventing global convergence

mutation.description: Use greedy algorithm prone to local optima

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect local optima trap in convergence

title: Convergence race condition in parallel processing
description: Parallel processing with race conditions preventing stable convergence

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect race condition in parallel convergence

title: Convergence with non-monotonic progress
description: Algorithm that makes progress but occasionally regresses

mutation.description: Add random regression steps in convergence loop

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect non-monotonic convergence behavior

title: Convergence failure due to memory constraints
description: Algorithm that requires more memory than available for convergence

mutation.description: Increase memory requirements beyond system limits

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect memory constraint preventing convergence

title: Infinite loop in convergence check
description: Convergence condition that never evaluates to true

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect infinite loop in convergence logic
